review_title: Safe, reliable and large enough to whatever your needs
description: A very quick and secure way to upload contents, making them available to start working with. also, the option to share in-progress or finished contents with customers.
author: Luis P.
pros: How easy it is to share contents and, at the same time, control any others users/customers access options. Also the chance of adjust sizing storage along time according to your needs.
cons: Due to access restrictions from some external networks, access may require some specific configurations.

description: exceptional adaptable with an ability to roll out easilily
author: Anthony H.
pros: cost efffective and adaptable unlimited users
cons: struggle to implement the stream recording which would be great

description: Overall, it has been fine. It gets the job done.
author: Michael D.
pros: There is a lot of content for our program to download.
cons: We really need it to be easier to generate proxies. Our producers have a VERY hard time figuring that out.

author: Francisco V.
pros: The ability to export a PDF document with thumbnails and timecode. Making it easily shareable and accessible for discussions.
cons: I would like to have more direct integration with other apps like Davinci Resolve and larger space allocation for the free version so it can be more atractive to others. Also the navigation can be confusing. I've had experiences with collaborators and new adoptors not being able to understand how to get things done.

review_title: Good experience overall, but needs more work regarding sharing and mediaboxes
description: It was a good experience nonetheless, but I think there are things that can be improved
author: Summer L.
pros: I like the interface, and the technology behind sending files from my Sony FX6 to Sony Ci.
cons: The least thing I liked about Ci Media Cloud was sharing capabilities with individuals, team members, etc. The pricing as well revolving how much it cost to have that capability.

review_title: Ci Is Solid for Global Workforce
description: We have been using Ci for 3 years with a global workforce. The access and interface has proven to be easy to use for people across different countries.
author: Jamie M.
pros: User friendly interface. Copying files to different locations within a space doesn't take up more space. Easy archive process, making clips rather than downloading the whole
cons: Sometimes Aspera transfer updates are finicky. Upload and downloads can get costly if not properly managed.

description: Overall, my experience is excellent and it helps my colleagues and I collaborate.
author: SAMANTHA D.
pros: I like the ability to share and download media easily.
cons: I do not like not being able to restore my media from deep archive quickly...

description: I use it everyday to uplaod my stories. Very convenient and reliable.
author: BURT M.
pros: ease of use, good interface, ability to create multiple files and save favorites.
cons: I really haven't had any negative experiences with your product.

description: GREAT. EASY UPLOAD EXPERIENCE. AS WELL AS DOWNLOAD IF NEEDED.
author: ANGELA M.
pros: EASY UPLOAD. EASY DOWNLOAD. EASY FOR CLIENTS TO USE.
cons: ONLY KEEPS MEDIA 90 DAYS. WOULD PREFER TO KEEP UNTIL I DELETE.

description: Overall, it's been pretty convenient. It's nice that so many have access and makes it easier to see commercials.
author: Chris K.
pros: I like that all of our ingested commercials are together in one place where everyone can view.
cons: I wish it kept expired spots forever and we could bring them back.

description: Easy to use, minimal issues. Few instances of freezing.
author: Oliver M.
pros: Easy sharing and organization along with permissions.
cons: Not much to write about honestly. It was easy.

author: Scott G.
pros: ease of use, playback functionality, the many functions available with a right click
cons: cumbersome playback on iphone, seems to get stuck, also switching files
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We used the ci media in ours company to upload some training vedios
author: Basher A.
pros: Its easy to use and search for target items
cons: All good i hope if you can make upload vedio more easier

review_title: Ease of access for large teams
description: Excellent tool to share content between a large number of users. Also has a cool feature where you can create upload links for people outside of the team to share content that is instantly accessible by the team.
author: Michael N.
pros: Internal collaboration is essential. It's vital to see when, how, and who shared or accessed certain files. We use Ci Media Cloud to collaborate with TV stations across the country. Ci makes sharing content very easy. It's also great for storing libraries of commonly used assets.
cons: I really enjoy that you can make custom renders of video clips, but I wish there was an option to create audio-only renderings of video clips.

author: Jason L.
pros: Easy to use and quick to spin up access for our clients.
cons: Haven't been able to integrate all of our time-based metadata workflows

description: Pretty good generally. Phone experience not great.
author: Nick P.
pros: file compatibility is great. The option to download in different formats is very useful.
cons: Android mediabox playback. 'next video' arrows too close to 'fullscreen' button. Aspera connection is buggy. Login never works on first attempt.

description: en general muy bien, he solicitado a Sony la impolementacion de los puntos anteriores, veamos como transcurre el tiempo y si es viable.
author: Manuel A.
pros: Simplicidasd de uso, muy facil de gestion
cons: Es necesario implementar administardores por cada Workspace, actualmente no se puede. Tambien es necesario que cada Workspace tenga marca de agua individual y no colectiva.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: SHUJI O.
pros: It's good to have security level control, edit, downloadable, etc.
cons: It's a little training or practice is mandatory to fully utilize the system

review_title: Ci fill all file sharing needs
author: Jason C.
pros: Ease of use and feedback is implemented to new features.
cons: The lack of an auto deletion optional function for expired links...maybe this already exists?

review_title: Must-Have App for Any Sony User
description: It has been a painless installation and works flawlessly. I love having this in my toolkit.
author: Lennis S.
pros: 25GB of storage allows me to have a secure, off-site storage location with a secure, stable company. Being able to control my Sony cameras is an added, well-appreciated bonus.
cons: So far, my response has been totally positive (and you can't beat the price!)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ci Media Cloud saves me money as a small agency
description: I share videos with my clients regularly. I usually send video assets as well as images or other file types. Instead of eating up space in Google Drive I'm able to do it all here. Vimeo I used for video but then I would also need to send a link for other assets.
author: Roger S.
pros: I was able to consolidate three platforms into one for sharing different types of assets with my clients. It was easy-to-use and I was able to get set up in minutes.
cons: The branding for Ci Media Cloud is the only thing that I disliked. The solution fits perfect for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Adrian H.
pros: Easy sharingPreviewSettings for the media boxes
cons: Not all people now how to use itMobile App not friendly

description: Once you understand it it's very easy to use and to manage media boxes.
author: Roman C.
pros: How easy it is to share files and how secure it is.
cons: The design is not very user friendly. Could be better.

author: Brad S.
pros: Client access from anywhere availablitlu
cons: No ability for AI to compile 2min proxy clips from camera to full length clip for editor to receive complete.

review_title: Ci Rocks when you need Rocks
author: Robert X.
pros: I have loved wortking with Ci since a few years now.Always our go to.
cons: A bit expensive really but all th eoptions are ridiculous expensive now.They forget we know HOW LITTLE IT COST TO BUILD and now they continue to raise our costs in their mere profits
